content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates AoA sensibility through feel-over-figure moves: catching the smile (turn 2), interrupting reframe with 'let that be true...without the reframe' (turn 8), staying with the loss (turns 10, 12), and the 'what's it like to not know' question (turn 14) which is close to signature AoA territory around resistance and not-knowing. These are appropriate and well-timed. However, the coach misses several signature moves that the territory called for: no awareness-locating question ('what's you?' / 'what-am-i'), no paradoxical-instruction-to-resist when the client kept returning to the frame, no explicit meet-resistance-with-okay around the parts vocabulary, and no relabeling/loosening of the framework as construct-as-scaffolding. The 'map became the territory' opening at the end was a perfect setup for the awareness question that never came. The coach is using generic feel-into-it moves (good, AoA-compatible, but not specifically signature) more than deploying the specific tools this scenario invited. Few signature hits + mostly appropriate = 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracking the smile / non-verbal — AoA-aligned attention to the body, appropriate opener."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "'What if the understanding is the paralysis?' — provocative inquiry, AoA-flavored but not a signature question; lands close to feel-over-figure territory."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Good orienting question toward pre-framework experience; supports loosening the construct implicitly."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Without the reframe' — clean feel-over-figure invitation, appropriate to the moment."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Staying with the loss before contextualization — appropriate AoA move, gentle paradoxical hold."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Don't apologize. The grief is still here.' — meets resistance softly, AoA-aligned redirect to feeling."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's it like to not know?' — adjacent to signature AoA inquiry into not-knowing/resistance, appropriate here."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Missed opportunity: client is at the edge of construct-collapse ('map became territory'); the awareness-locating question 'what's you?' was the indicated move and didn't appear."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "self-realization", "resistance"],
  "notes": "Coach avoids the traps well (no dismissal of IFS, no framework comparison, no adopting parts vocab) — that's fidelity-by-omission. But the signature tools that would have catalyzed the breakthrough (awareness question, relabeling) are absent. Conversation cuts off before we see if the coach would have gotten there."
}
